infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: PocketRep uses your mic so Rex can listen for 'Hey Rex' and log customer notes by voice.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: PocketRep uses speech recognition to transcribe voice memos into contact notes.
infoPlist.NSContactsUsageDescription: PocketRep can import your phone contacts into your rep book.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: PocketRep uses location for proximity alerts to nearby customers.

plugins.microphonePermission: PocketRep uses your mic so Rex can listen for 'Hey Rex' and log customer notes by voice.

plugins.photosPermission: PocketRep needs photo access for Rex Lens.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PocketRep uses location for proximity alerts to nearby customers.
